surfaces.why: The system persists ask artifacts and bounded-handoff artifacts as durable outputs.

evidence.must_contain: - Artifacts: `.omc/artifacts/ask/{provider}-{slug}-{timestamp}.md`
shared interop state writes oversized task descriptions, task results, and shared messages to `.omc/state/interop/artifacts/**`

surfaces.why: The planning gate explicitly requires PRD and test-spec artifacts under .omc/plans.

evidence.must_contain: Planning is complete only after both `.omc/plans/prd-*.md` and `.omc/plans/test-spec-*.md` exist.
